Plaintiff'S Order To Show Cause To Defendants Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Oct-20-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFFS GARY CHENG AND JESSICA CHENG'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO DEFENDANTS RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION.

APPEARANCES: Evan Hyun, Esq. of Law Offices of Peter L. Kutrubes 925/939-9600 for pltfs & moving parties; Deepika S. Saluja, Esq. of Barrett Daffin Frappier Treder & Weiss, LLP 626/915-5714 for deft & opposing party One West Bank, FSB (appearing via CourtCall).

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - denied. Plaintiff did not tender, nor exhibit any ability or willingness to tender, full payment of all undisputed sums due. Ms. Saluja to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Plaintiff'S Order To Show Cause To Defendants Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Oct-08-2010 Continued To Oct-20-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF GARY CHENG AND JESSICA CHENG'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO DEFENDANTS RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 20, 2010. DEFENDANT TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPY OF OPPOSITION WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. TRO TO REMAIN IN EFFECT. (302/PHA) JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Plaintiff'S Order To Show Cause To Defendants Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Sep-10-2010 Continued To Oct-08-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Evan Hyun of the Law Offices of Peter L. Kutrubes (925.939.9600) for plaintiff and moving party

No other appearances. Counsel presented the court with a stipulation to continue the matter, and the court modified its ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO DEFENDANTS RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION is continued to October 8, 2010 per stipulation of the parties. Opposition to be filed by September 27, 2010, reply to be filed by October 4, 2010. Temporary restraining order to remain in full force and effect through the next hearing date. Order on stipulation filed in open court. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
